# Replace lodash cloneDeep with fast-copy

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-07 -->

## Status

Accepted

## Context

The library used `lodash.cloneDeep` to deep-copy the input response before mutation. Lodash added significant bundle weight for a single utility function. The library previously had its own dependency issues from lodash sub-packages (lodash-contrib was removed in 2015).

Commit `b6bffed` (2020-11-25): "feat: remove lodash and replace cloneDeep with fast-copy"

## Decision

Replace `lodash.cloneDeep` with `fast-copy`, a lightweight deep-clone library optimized for JSON-like data structures. This provides:
- Significantly smaller bundle size (fast-copy is ~1KB vs lodash.cloneDeep at ~15KB)
- Better performance for the CDA response shapes this library handles

## Consequences

- Reduced bundle size for all consumers (especially browser bundles)
- `fast-copy` is the sole runtime dependency
- The library guarantees input immutability: callers can safely reuse their response objects
- `fast-copy` major version bumps require careful testing (v2 to v3 migration happened in 2025)
